jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Cars24
jsonLd.description:
Cars24 invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Cars24:
Cars24 is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cars24!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
